payload.friendly_name: Evict WP runtime state into the event log
payload.purpose_context: The WP markdown file today holds both static design intent and runtime-mutable state written on every lifecycle event. That split churns the dossier content hash, forces operators to hand-tick subtask checkboxes before review, and splits status truth between markdown and the event log. This mission (the #2684 P0, implementing the #2093 authority ruling) evicts all runtime-mutable state into a single generic InnerStateChanged event folded into the reduced snapshot, leaving WP files as static design intent.
payload.purpose_tldr: Single-source work-package runtime state in the append-only event log instead of the WP markdown files, ending the status split-brain and the content-hash churn.

payload.wp_title: Subtask emit + reader delegate (turns the red test green)
Transition-core gates: force-fix + subtask gate re-source
Event foundation + reducer fold + emit API
